ddls:
CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "industry_code" TEXT /* Code or designation of the industry (e.g., OEWS Designation) */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent industry (for categorization) */,
  "industry_category" TEXT /* Category of the industry (e.g., manufacturing, services) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment data entry */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "employment_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the industry */,
  "percent_employment" REAL /* Percentage of total employment in the industry */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wage_data" (
  "wage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wage data entry */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "hourly_mean_wage" REAL /* Average hourly wage in the industry */,
  "annual_mean_wage" REAL /* Average annual wage in the industry */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wage_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wage_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wage_data_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wage_data_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, survey, industry report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., state, county, metropolitan area) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_regions" (
  "industry_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry-region relationship */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "region_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the industry's employment in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_regions_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., research, analytics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., employment, wage) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_verification" (
  "verification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification event */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data being verified (e.g., employment, wage) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being verified */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who verified the data */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was verified */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status (e.g., verified, pending, rejected) */,
  "verification_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("verification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_verification_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of data collection method (e.g., survey, government report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection event */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data being collected (e.g., employment, wage) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being collected */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "collection_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES wage_data ("wage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES employment_data ("employment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data being stored (e.g., employment, wage) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being stored */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical data */,
  "employment_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the industry (for employment data) */,
  "hourly_mean_wage" REAL /* Average hourly wage in the industry (for wage data) */,
  "annual_mean_wage" REAL /* Average annual wage in the industry (for wage data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES wage_data ("wage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES employment_data ("employment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data being stored (e.g., employment, wage) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being stored */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Name of the metadata field */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES wage_data ("wage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES employment_data ("employment_id")
)
